bugs.expected: Raw restricted QA evidence should keep source residue out of public reports while still blocking credential-like findings.
bugs.actual: The first final audit run used strict public-release scan settings, so expected restricted-material residue in raw evidence blocked the final scan.
bugs.resolution: Reran the same final smoke with the explicit restricted-QA residue allowance; final release safety scan passed with zero blocking findings, and the public report records only redacted counts.
